headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on PPG Indus, Lowers Price Target to $130
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Michael Sison   maintains PPG Indus (NYSE:PPG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $135 to $130.

headline: PPG Industries: Upside Can Be Volatile, Looking At 2026
summary: PPG Industries' performance has not been a massive outperformer, yet its risk/reward profile remains attractive. Learn why PPG stock is rated a buy.
